languages.text: {n}Звонкий голос Ведки заставляет стоящего рядом с ней Батошски поморщиться.{/n} "Вы все слышали? Фон Валанциус вновь с нами! {mf|Он|Она} сразит Погонщицу, пройдет Тренировочный Бой с полковником и примет нашу присягу! Последний Приказ будет исполнен, как и было обещано!"

{n}Dunawski's ringing voice makes Batoshski, standing beside her, wince.{/n} "Did you all hear that? Von Valancius is with us now! {mf|He|She} will slay the Drover, endure the Trial Match with the colonel, and accept our oath! The Final Order shall be fulfilled, just as was promised!"
languages.original_text: {n}Звонкий голос Ведки заставляет стоящего рядом с ней Батошски поморщиться.{/n} "Вы все слышали? Фон Валанциус вновь с нами! {mf|Он|Она} сразит Погонщицу, пройдет Тренировочный Бой с полковником и примет нашу присягу! Последний Приказ будет исполнен, как и было обещано!"

Von Valancius is with us now! {mf|He|She} will slay the Drover, endure the Trial Match with the Colonel, and accept our oath! The Final Order shall be fulfilled, just as was promised!"

{n}Vedka's ringing voice makes Batoshski, standing beside her, wince.{/n} "Did you all hear that? Von Valancius is with us now! {mf|He|She} will slay the Drover, endure the Trial Match with the colonel, and accept our oath! The Final Order shall be fulfilled, just as was promised!"

{n}A murmur runs through the crowd. You can hear the stifled shouts: "Valancius!" The murmurs are difficult to make out, but the mood of the crowd seems to be divided: some look on with wariness and anger, while others watch with hope and excitement.{/n}

{n}Vedka's ringing voice makes Batoshski, standing beside her, wince.{/n} "Did you all hear that? Von Valancius is with us now! {mf|He|She} will slay the Drover, endure the Trial Match with the Colonel, and accept our oath! The Final Order shall be fulfilled, just as was promised!"

{n}Vedka's ringing voice makes Batoshski, standing beside her, wince.{/n} "Did you all hear that? Von Valancius is with us now! {mf|He|She} will slay the Drover, endure the Trial Match with the colonel, and accept our oath! The Final Order shall be fulfilled, just as was promised!"

{n}Dunawski's ringing voice makes Batoshski, standing beside her, wince.{/n} "Did you all hear that? Von Valancius is with us now! {mf|He|She} will slay the Drover, endure the Trial Match with the colonel, and accept our oath! The Final Order shall be fulfilled, just as was promised!"

languages.text: {n}群衆から「バルアンシウス！」という声が漏れる。群衆の反応は二分されている。警戒と怒りを見せる者もいれば、期待と興奮を見せる者もいる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A murmur runs through the crowd. You can hear the stifled shouts: "Valancius!" The murmurs are difficult to make out, but the mood of the crowd seems to be divided: some look on with wariness and anger, while others watch with hope and excitement.{/n}

traits.locale_text:
群衆から「バルアンシウス！」という声が漏れる。
群衆の反応は二分されている。警戒と怒りを見せる者もいれば、期待と興奮を見せる者もいる。

languages.text: {n}Vedkas durchdringende Stimme lässt Batoshski, der neben ihr steht, zusammenzucken.{/n} "Habt Ihr das alle gehört? Von Valancius ist jetzt bei uns! {mf|Er|Sie} wird den Treiber töten, den Prüfungskampf mit dem Colonel überleben und unseren Eid abnehmen! Der letzte Befehl wird ausgeführt, genau wie versprochen!"
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka's ringing voice makes Batoshski, standing beside her, wince.{/n} "Did you all hear that? Von Valancius is with us now! {mf|He|She} will slay the Drover, endure the Trial Match with the colonel, and accept our oath! The Final Order shall be fulfilled, just as was promised!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Vedkas durchdringende Stimme lässt Batoshski, der neben ihr steht, zusammenzucken.{/n} "Habt Ihr das alle gehört? Von Valancius ist jetzt bei uns! {mf|Er|Sie} wird den Treiber töten, den Prüfungskampf mit dem Colonel überleben und unseren Eid abnehmen! Der letzte Befehl wird ausgeführt, genau wie versprochen!"

languages.text: {n}La voix tonitruante de Vedka fait grimacer Batoshski, qui se tient juste à côté d'elle.{/n} « Vous avez entendu ça, vous autres ? Von Valancius est désormais à nos côtés ! {mf|Il|Elle} va tuer le Chasseur, affronter le colonel dans le cadre de l'Épreuve par les armes et accepter notre serment ! L'Ordre ultime sera enfin accompli, comme promis ! »
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka's ringing voice makes Batoshski, standing beside her, wince.{/n} "Did you all hear that? Von Valancius is with us now! {mf|He|She} will slay the Drover, endure the Trial Match with the colonel, and accept our oath! The Final Order shall be fulfilled, just as was promised!"

traits.locale_text: {n}La voix tonitruante de Vedka fait grimacer Batoshski, qui se tient juste à côté d'elle.{/n} « Vous avez entendu ça, vous autres ? Von Valancius est désormais à nos côtés ! {mf|Il|Elle} va tuer le Chasseur, affronter le colonel dans le cadre de l'Épreuve par les armes et accepter notre serment ! L'Ordre ultime sera enfin accompli, comme promis ! »

languages.text: {n}La sonora voz de Vedka hace que Batoshski, a quien tiene a su lado, haga un gesto de dolor.{/n} «¿Lo han oído todo? ¡Von Valancius nos acompaña! ¡Matará al Pastor, superará la prueba de combate con el coronel y aceptará nuestro juramento! ¡La última orden se cumplirá, cumpliendo lo prometido!».
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka's ringing voice makes Batoshski, standing beside her, wince.{/n} "Did you all hear that? Von Valancius is with us now! {mf|He|She} will slay the Drover, endure the Trial Match with the colonel, and accept our oath! The Final Order shall be fulfilled, just as was promised!"

traits.locale_text: {n}La sonora voz de Vedka hace que Batoshski, a quien tiene a su lado, haga un gesto de dolor.{/n} «¿Lo han oído todo? ¡Von Valancius nos acompaña! ¡Matará al Pastor, superará la prueba de combate con el coronel y aceptará nuestro juramento! ¡La última orden se cumplirá, cumpliendo lo prometido!».

languages.text: {n}Vedka'nın çınlayan sesi, yanında duran Batoshski'yi irkiltiyor.{/n} "Duydunuz mu? Von Valancius artık bizimle! Çoban'ı katledecek, Albay'la Sınav Karşılaşması'na çıkacak ve yeminimizi kabul edecek! Son Emir, tıpkı söz verildiği gibi yerine getirilecek!"
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka's ringing voice makes Batoshski, standing beside her, wince.{/n} "Did you all hear that? Von Valancius is with us now! {mf|He|She} will slay the Drover, endure the Trial Match with the colonel, and accept our oath! The Final Order shall be fulfilled, just as was promised!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Vedka'nın çınlayan sesi, yanında duran Batoshski'yi irkiltiyor.{/n} "Duydunuz mu? Von Valancius artık bizimle! Çoban'ı katledecek, Albay'la Sınav Karşılaşması'na çıkacak ve yeminimizi kabul edecek! Son Emir, tıpkı söz verildiği gibi yerine getirilecek!"

languages.text: {n}薇德卡响亮的声音让站在她身边的巴托什斯基不禁皱起了眉头。{/n}“你们都听见了吗？冯·瓦兰修斯如今与我们同在！舰长大人将斩杀拒生花，与上校完成‘试炼比武’，并接受我们的宣誓！‘最后的命令’必将实现，正如预言所承诺的那样！”
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka's ringing voice makes Batoshski, standing beside her, wince.{/n} "Did you all hear that? Von Valancius is with us now! {mf|He|She} will slay the Drover, endure the Trial Match with the colonel, and accept our oath! The Final Order shall be fulfilled, just as was promised!"

traits.locale_text: {n}薇德卡响亮的声音让站在她身边的巴托什斯基不禁皱起了眉头。{/n}“你们都听见了吗？冯·瓦兰修斯如今与我们同在！舰长大人将斩杀拒生花，与上校完成‘试炼比武’，并接受我们的宣誓！‘最后的命令’必将实现，正如预言所承诺的那样！”
